session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8597 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the pr-feedback-classifier skill and execute it with the specified PR number.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll fetch the PR feedback for PR 8597 using the specified command:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "No main branch or unable to diff"
Get file restructuring context for the PR

## ❌ Test Coverage Review

| `src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py` | Modified | ✅ `tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_dispatch.py` |

- `uv.lock` — lock file

</details>", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8597#issuecomment-3983250336" }, { "id": 3983252518, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "<!-- dignified-code-simplifier-review -->

## ❌ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-02 01:42:55 PT

Found 4 violations across 2 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Pathlib usage - None found
✅ Type annotations - None found
✅ Property complexity - None found
❌ LBYL vs EAFP - Found violations (1)
❌ Proper imports - Found violations (3)

### Violations Summary
- `fast_llm.py:26`: bare `except Exception:` as control flow instead of LBYL
- `fast_llm.py:27`: inline import of anthropic without justification
- `plan_cmd.py:239`: inline imports of branch_slug_generator and fast_llm functions
- `one_shot_dispatch.py:198`: inline imports of branch_slug_generator and fast_llm functions

### Files Reviewed
- `src/erk/core/fast_llm.py`: 2 violations
- `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py`: 1 violation
- `src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py`: 1 violation
- `pyproject.toml`: 0 violations
- `uv.lock`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-02 01:42:55 PT**: Found 4 violations (bare except in fast_llm.py, inline imports in 3 locations)

</details>", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8597#issuecomment-3983252518"

"body": "<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ❌ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-02 01:43:02 PT

Found 4 violations across 3 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - None found
✅ Path operations (exists before resolve) - None found
✅ Exception handling at boundaries - None found
✅ No re-exports - None found
❌ Inline imports without justification - Found in 4 locations

### Violations Summary
- : Inline import of anthropic module inside try block - should be at module level
- : Inline imports of branch_slug_generator and fast_llm modules - should be at module level
- : Duplicate inline imports of same modules - should be at module level
- : Inline imports of branch_slug_generator and fast_llm modules - should be at module level

### Files Reviewed
- : 1 violation
- : 2 violations
- : 1 violation
- : 0 violations (non-Python)
- : 0 violations (non-Python)

---

### Activity Log

</details>",

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C HEAD~1...HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat HEAD~3..HEAD
